title: AI Worries Weighed on Jack Henry (JKHY) in Q2
excerpt: Upslope Capital Management, an investment management company, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here....
content_html:
Soumya Eswaran

Wed, July 22, 2026 at 9:51 AM EDT 2 min read

Upslope Capital Management, an investment management company, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Upslope aims to provide attractive, equity-like returns while reducing market risk and keeping low correlation with traditional equity strategies. The portfolio tailed in the speculative mania environment as investors broadly avoided boring, cash-flowing, non-AI stocks. The Fund returned -6.6% (net) in Q2 compared to +14.3% return for the S&P Midcap 400 ETF (MDY) and +10.3% gain for the HFRX Equity Hedge Index.  In addition, you can check the Fund's top five holdings to determine its best picks for 2026.

In its Q2 2026 investor letter, Upslope Capital Management highlighted Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY). Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) is a financial technology company that offers solutions and payment processing services for community banks and credit unions. On July 21, 2026, Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) closed at $148.90 per share, reflecting a market capitalization of $10.58 billion. Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) posted a one-month return of 16.27%, while its shares lost 17.52% over the past 52 weeks.

Upslope Capital Management stated the following regarding Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) in its Q2 2026 investor update:

"The Fund also exited Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY), fintech business focused on core processing and payments for regional banks). This was disappointing, as the exit was largely due to risk management. Fundamentals remained solid, but shares were hit hard by AI worries. "Proving" the market wrong about these worries will simply take time (a lot of it) and, possibly, additional valuation compression. JKHY was not the only holding with this perceived risk and exiting was aimed at reducing broader exposure to a manageable level."

Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) is not on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 38 hedge fund portfolios held Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) at the end of the first quarter, compared to 37 in the previous quarter. While we acknowledge the potential of Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

content_html_zh:
苏米娅·埃斯瓦兰

2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三，美国东部时间上午 9:51 阅读 2 分钟

投资管理公司Upslope Capital Management发布了2026年第二季度投资者信函。 该信函的副本可以在此处下载。 Upslope 旨在提供有吸引力的、类似股票的回报，同时降低市场风险并保持与传统股票策略的低相关性。 该投资组合在投机狂热环境中表现不佳，因为投资者普遍回避乏味、现金流量大的非人工智能股票。 该基金第二季度的回报率为 -6.6%（净值），而 S&P Midcap 400 ETF (MDY) 的回报率为 +14.3%，HFRX 股票对冲指数的回报率为 +10.3%。 此外，您还可以查看该基金的前五名持股，以确定其2026年的最佳选择。

Upslope Capital Management 在其 2026 年第二季度投资者信中重点关注了 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）。 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）是一家金融科技公司，为社区银行和信用合作社提供解决方案和支付处理服务。 2026 年 7 月 21 日，Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）收于每股 148.90 美元，市值为 105.8 亿美元。 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）公布的一个月回报率为 16.27%，而其股价在过去 52 周内下跌了 17.52%。

Upslope Capital Management 在其 2026 年第二季度投资者更新中就 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）发表了以下声明：

“该基金还退出了 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY），该公司是一家专注于区域银行核心处理和支付的金融科技公司。 这令人失望，因为退出主要是由于风险管理。 基本面依然稳固，但股价因人工智能担忧而遭受重创。 “证明”市场对这些担忧的错误只是需要时间（很多），而且可能还需要额外的估值压缩。 JKHY 并不是唯一一家存在这种风险的控股公司，退出的目的是将更广泛的风险敞口减少到可管理的水平。”

Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）并未出现在我们的 2026 年对冲基金最受欢迎的 40 只股票名单中。 根据我们的数据库，截至第一季度末，有 38 个对冲基金投资组合持有 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY），而上一季度为 37 个。 虽然我们承认 Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：JKHY）作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。 如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
